metadata.project: CBSFIM – Customer Behavior & Strategic Financial Impact

dashboard_1_executive_overview.title: Executive Overview — Financial Health & Risk Snapshot

kpi_cards.label: Revenue at Risk
kpi_cards.color_logic: red if > 5%, amber if 3-5%, green otherwise

kpi_cards.label: Portfolio Churn Rate
kpi_cards.color_logic: red if > 25%, amber if 15-25%, green otherwise

charts.title: Monthly Revenue vs Revenue at Risk (24-month trend)
charts.business_purpose: Detect whether revenue and risk are trending in opposite directions — the most dangerous scenario.

charts.title: Revenue by Segment — Contribution Bar
charts.business_purpose: Show revenue composition — HNW dominance drives concentration risk narrative.

charts.title: Churn Rate by Segment — Bullet Chart
charts.color_logic: red if > 25%, amber if 15-25%, green otherwise
charts.business_purpose: Show which segment is underperforming retention targets.

charts.title: MoM Revenue Growth (%)
charts.business_purpose: Identify seasonal patterns and revenue acceleration/deceleration.

dashboard_2_customer_risk.title: Customer Risk Analysis — Churn Segmentation & Behavioural Patterns
dashboard_2_customer_risk.audience: Risk Manager, Head of Retention, Customer Analytics
dashboard_2_customer_risk.layout: 3-column — left filters, centre scatter, right distributions

charts.title: Risk × Value Scatter Plot — the core retention view
quadrant_labels: Q3 (bottom-right): MONITOR — Low value, high risk
charts.business_purpose: The single most actionable view — instantly shows which customers to call tomorrow morning.

charts.title: Risk Distribution — Histogram by Segment
charts.business_purpose: Show shape of risk distribution per segment.

charts.title: Inactivity Streak vs Churn Probability
charts.business_purpose: Validate that inactivity is a leading churn signal — key input to early-warning alert rules.

charts.title: Engagement Index Distribution
charts.business_purpose: Show that low engagement concentrates in high-risk cohort — supports the case for digital activation investment.

charts.title: Risk Cluster Map by Region
charts.business_purpose: Geographic risk hotspot identification.

dashboard_3_financial_impact.title: Financial Impact — Profitability, Revenue Loss & CLV Destruction
dashboard_3_financial_impact.audience: CFO, Head of Finance, Product P&L Owners
dashboard_3_financial_impact.layout: 2-row — top summary bars, bottom heatmap + waterfall

charts.title: Revenue Loss Waterfall — Total → At Risk → Expected Loss
bars: – Revenue at Risk (red, expected loss if all high-risk churn)
charts.business_purpose: Make the financial exposure concrete — the gap between total and protected revenue is the retention investment ceiling.

charts.title: Revenue at Risk by Segment — Stacked Bar
charts.business_purpose: Which segment carries the highest absolute RAR.

charts.title: Profitability Heatmap — Segment × Region
charts.business_purpose: Identify loss-making segment–region combinations for targeted pricing or cost-reduction action.

charts.title: Top 50 At-Risk Customers by Revenue at Risk
charts.business_purpose: Identify the exact accounts to call first.

charts.title: CLV Destruction Timeline — Cumulative CLV at Risk per Month
charts.business_purpose: Show how revenue-at-risk compounds over time if no retention action is taken — creates urgency.

charts.title: Net Profit Margin by Segment (trend)
charts.business_purpose: Track whether margin compression is worsening.

filters_and_parameters: Revenue at Risk threshold (parameter — show customers above $X)

dashboard_4_ai_recommendations.title: AI Recommendations — Retention Action Centre
dashboard_4_ai_recommendations.audience: Relationship Managers, Branch Heads, CRM Team

charts.title: Priority Action Queue — Sortable Customer List
charts.business_purpose: The morning call list for relationship managers — sorted by priority_score so the highest-ROI call is first.

charts.title: Action Distribution — Donut / Treemap
charts.business_purpose: Workforce planning — how many relationship managers are needed for RETAIN vs CROSS_SELL workloads?

charts.title: Priority Score Distribution by Action Type
charts.business_purpose: Validate that RETAIN actions have significantly higher priority scores — confirms model quality.

charts.title: Engagement vs Priority Score — Scatter (action type)
charts.business_purpose: Show that high-priority customers are not necessarily low-engagement — some are active but still at risk (balance-driven risk), requiring different interventions.

charts.title: Retention ROI Simulator
charts.calculated_field:
Revenue Saved = SUM(revenue_at_risk) × [retention_success_rate] / 100
Retention Cost = COUNT(is_high_risk) × [avg_retention_cost_per_customer]
Net ROI = Revenue Saved − Retention Cost
charts.display: KPI cards showing Revenue Saved, Cost, Net ROI
charts.business_purpose: Allows executives to simulate retention programme ROI before committing budget — turns analytics into a business case tool.

filters_and_parameters: CLV floor (parameter — show only customers with CLV > $X)
